countdown_type.description: Vorsiber gave them your true name, and something very far up has begun to move. It has glassed cities for less. It is coming for the heat of you.
countdown_type.strategy_tip: When this ends, the bombardment arrives. You have spent the descent building the thermocytes that turn that fire into fuel.

countdown_type.display_name: Something Very Far Up Is Moving
countdown_type.description: You made yourself too bright to ignore. Something in orbit has decided the cheapest answer to you is heat, and a great deal of it. It has glassed cities for less.
countdown_type.strategy_tip: When this ends the bombardment arrives. If you staged the thermocytes, the fire is fuel and a launch window. If not, it is only fire.
